terms_subtitle: Please read our terms and conditions carefully.
terms_account_desc: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account information.
terms_reservation_desc: Reserved books must be picked up within allowed time.
terms_borrowing_desc: Borrowed books should be returned before due dates.
terms_delivery_desc: Delivery times depend on inventory and processing.
terms_platform_desc: Users should avoid misuse of library resources.
faq_subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our services
faq_q1: How do I reserve a book?
faq_a1: Use the virtual robot assistant or open the Books page and select Reserve.
faq_q2: Can I borrow books using the robot assistant?
faq_a2: Yes, borrowing workflows are integrated into the system.
faq_q3: How long can I keep borrowed books?
faq_a3: Books may be borrowed according to library policy.
faq_a4: Yes. Open your request history and cancel eligible reservations before processing starts.
faq_a5: You will receive updates for reservation, pickup, and delivery status directly in the platform.
faq_a6: Purchasable titles are marked in book detail pages and can be processed through the same request flow.
faq_q7: Can I view my borrowing history?
faq_a7: Yes. Your account pages include current and previous request records.
faq_a8: When tracking is available, open the request details page to view live robot delivery status.
faq_q9: Can I use the service on mobile?
faq_a9: Yes. Core library actions are available on mobile with responsive layouts.
faq_a10: Use the Customer Support page and submit an inquiry through the support options.
notice_subtitle: Stay updated with our latest announcements and news
notice1_desc: Our library robot assistant now supports faster book pickup scheduling.
notice2_desc: Users can now reserve books directly through virtual robot assistance.
notice3_desc: Book inventory synchronization improvements have been deployed.
notice4_desc: Weekend operating hours have been extended.
notice5_desc: Better mobile responsiveness is now available.
notice6_desc: Students can now request additional academic resources.
